description: OSC routing schema for TouchDesigner ↔ Blender ↔ Unreal Engine bridge. All agents reference this schema for parameter paths and data types.

melusina_pitch.description: VoiceSynth fundamental frequency → UE shader warp amount

melusina_amplitude.description: VoiceSynth RMS amplitude → UE particle spawn rate

melusina_formants.description: VoiceSynth formant analysis → TD particle color palette

toon_params.description: TD → UE Substrate Toon parameter group: [bloom_intensity, bloom_threshold, bloom_r, bloom_g, bloom_b, shadow_r, shadow_g, shadow_b, saturation, contrast, diffuse_wrap, reserved]

fabric_specular.description: Fabric material params: [roughness, anisotropy, clearcoat, sheen_weight] for satin/velvet rendering

beat_sync.description: Music beat synchronization phase (normalized to beat duration)

time_of_day_seconds.description: Absolute time of day in seconds (0-86400)

blender_camera_transform.description: Blender camera Z-up world matrix (4x4, column-major)

mesh_count.description: Number of generated meshes in current export batch

vertex_count.description: Total vertex count for generated geometry

TD_NikkiPreview.description: TD composited Nikki-style preview with bloom, color grade, and particles

UE_RenderTarget.description: UE render target for real-time feedback to TD

Blender_Viewport.description: Blender viewport capture for live geometry preview in TD
